title: Fix admin users table layout misalignment
description: The admin users table rows are misaligned and unreadable because `.desktop-only` class uses `display: inline-flex`, which breaks `<td>` and `<th>` elements when applied directly to them. 1. In `frontend/pages/admin/users/index.vue`, update the CSS for `.desktop-only` and `.mobile-only` to use `display: table-cell` when applied to table elements, or wrap content inside `<td>`/`<th>` with these classes instead of applying them to the tags themselves. 2. Ensure table headers and cells have consistent padding and vertical alignment. 3. Ensure `UCard` padding overrides don't break the table's full-width appearance.
acceptance_criteria: Table headers align with table body columns
Columns have sufficient spacing and don't overflow
Vertical alignment in cells is 'middle' or 'top' consistently
Mobile view shows correct subset of columns without breaking layout
The .desktop-only class no longer uses inline-flex on <td>/<th> elements
